name: Baingan Bharta
recipeIngredient: 1 large Purple eggplant (skin should be firm)
1 to 2 tsp. any generic Indian Masala powder
X Hot pepper (e.g., jalapeno) to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the eggplant (lightly oiled) on an open flame, turning it around until the skin is charred and completely black. The eggplant may burst open and make a mess.
2. If using an electric range, grill it on a hot skillet at maximum heat.
3. Peel the cooled eggplant slightly and mash with a fork.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons (or 1) oil in a pan. Fry cumin seeds, chopped onion, and crushed garlic with turmeric added.
5. Add half of the chopped tomatoes. Continue frying until ready.
6. Add mashed eggplant, salt, masala powder, and hot pepper to taste.
7. Cook on low heat for about 5-7 minutes. Let cool slightly.
8. Stir in lemon juice. Garnish with remaining chopped tomatoes and cilantro.
9. Serve with hot parathas or pita bread.
